title: Nexus AI OS Executable DAG Schema
description: JSON schema for validating inter-agent task plans and execution DAGs

tasks.description: The flat list of sub-tasks forming a Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG)

id.description: Unique identifier for the task, e.g. A1, task_1

description.description: Clear imperative description of the task objective

assigned_to.description: The exact class name of the specialized agent assigned to execute this task

dependencies.description: List of task IDs that must be completed before this task can start
